name: test_tallying
description:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:
1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
   provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
Verification:
- Tally counts match expected values after each step.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:

  1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
    provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
  2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
    Verification:
  • Tally counts match expected values after each step.

testStage.description:
Test: Check the tallying feature counts as expected
Steps:
1. Record consent for injection, withdraw it, invalidate it,
   provide nasal spray consent and vaccinate.
2. Verify the tally updates correctly after each action.
Verification:
- Tally counts match expected values after each step.

steps.name: Click on Record a new consent response
Click on Record a new consent response
Click on 'Dr Stewart Higgins (Dad)' radio button
Click on Yes, for the injected vaccine only
Click on Yes, for the injected vaccine only
Select 'No' for health question 'Does your child have a bleeding disorder or are they taking anticoagulant therapy?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.BLEEDING_DISORDER_FLU: 'Does your child have a bleeding disorder or are they taking anticoagulant therapy?'>, 'No')

steps.name: Select 'No' for health question 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the injected flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.SEVERE_ALLERGIC_REACTION_INJECTED: 'Has your child had a severe allergic reaction (anaphylaxis) to a previous dose of the injected flu vaccine, or any ingredient of the vaccine?'>, 'No')

parameters.name: args
parameters.value: (<HealthQuestion.MEDICAL_CONDITIONS_FLU: 'Does your child have any other medical conditions the immunisation team should be aware of?'>, 'No')

parameters.name: args
